content:
# Session 42 — summary

## NO PROVER LANE — terminal closeout (6th consecutive)
- `attempts_raw.jsonl` line 1 = `{type: summary, no_prover_lane: true, iter: 42}`. `prover.jsonl` empty.
  `sync_leanok` iter=42 sha=`aeb1e74` +0/−0, `chapters_touched: []`. Single extraction commit `c53d9c9`
  — no `.lean` edit since iter-036; no regression possible.
- No closable in-cone sorry exists. Independently re-confirmed: only `Picard/QuotScheme.lean` (4 typed
  χ skeletons, L126/165/201/228) + `Picard/RelativeSpec.lean` carry typed sorries — both out-of-leg.
  `Picard/SectionGradedRing.lean:3880` grep hit is a comment ("…no proof exists without `sorryAx`"),
  NOT a typed sorry — file is sorry-free.
- Mechanical no-dispatch is correct, as iters 037–041: re-probe χ (cohomology/Snapper-gated), open
  cohomology megaleg (overreach; critic-validated H⁰ scope, not USER-opened), split done file (busywork;
  split directive targets files with UNPROVED theorems) — all declined.

## Leg state — DELIVERED axiom-clean, await merge
`Grassmannian.represents` + `tautologicalQuotient_epi` + B1–B7 assoc + ∀L `GSemiring` + invertible-L
`GCommSemiring` + module `sectionGradedModule_gmodule`. `SectionGradedRing.lean` SORRY-FREE. No live frontier.

## Blueprint doctor — out-of-cone, do NOT edit (merge-time)
`logs/iter-042/blueprint-doctor.md`: dormant inherited chapters only —
- `Cohomology_FlatBaseChange.tex`: 2 phantom covers (`FlatBaseChange.lean`/`FlatBaseChangeGlobal.lean`
  do not exist) + 14 broken `\ref`.
- `Picard_GlueDescent.tex`: 4 broken `\cref`/`\uses`.
- `Picard_QuotScheme.tex`: 13 broken `\cref`.
No prover dispatched near them ⇒ phantom covers misroute nothing. Resolve at merge per Archon memory.

## Coverage debt
~356 `lean_aux` unmatched = inherited parent-blueprinted construction decls (single-commit extraction).
Merge-time; not this leg's debt.

## No regression
All prior deliverables intact axiom-clean (`{propext, Classical.choice, Quot.sound}`). Knowledge Base unchanged.
